summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BI Keuangan (Financial BI Dashboard) module - both backend and frontend. All tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/finance/bi (default year) - returns current year data with all required fields
Backend: GET /api/finance/bi?year=2026 - returns 12 monthly entries, July has operational data (opex=1.5M, net_income=-1.5M)
Backend: KPI structure verified (revenue, expense, net_income, gross_margin, net_margin)
Backend: Ratios structure verified (gross_margin, net_margin, current_ratio, debt_to_equity, balance sheet totals)
Backend: Entity comparison verified (2 entities: KSC, Kanda, sorted by revenue desc, multi_entity=true)
Backend: Single entity scope (entity_id=ent_ksc) returns only that entity
Backend: Data consistency verified (operational data excludes closing entries)
Backend: Regression - Income Statement API still works correctly
Backend: Regression - Balance Sheet API still works correctly (balanced=true)
Backend: Regression - Trial Balance API still works correctly (balanced=true)
Frontend: Login successful
Frontend: Navigation to BI Keuangan works (via ANALITIK (BI) menu group)
Frontend: BI Finance view loads without errors (data-testid='bi-finance-view' found)
Frontend: All 4 KPI cards display correctly (Pendapatan, Beban, Laba Bersih, Marjin Bersih)
Frontend: Monthly trend chart renders (recharts ComposedChart with 12 months)
Frontend: All 4 ratio cards display correctly (Marjin Kotor, Marjin Bersih, Rasio Lancar, Debt-to-Equity)
Frontend: Entity comparison displays (chart and table with 2 entities)
Frontend: Year selector found and functional
Frontend: Refresh button works correctly
Frontend: Regression - General Ledger module loads correctly
Frontend: Regression - Financial Statements module loads correctly
Frontend: Regression - Closing module loads correctly

backend.response_structure: Correct - returns {year, monthly[12], kpi, ratios, entity_comparison, multi_entity}
backend.monthly_data: 12 entries with correct structure (month, label, revenue, cogs, opex, expense, gross_profit, net_income)
backend.july_2026_data: Correctly shows opex=1,500,000 and net_income=-1,500,000 from seed data
backend.kpi_ytd: All fields present (revenue, expense, net_income, gross_margin, net_margin)
backend.ratios: All fields present, current_ratio correctly null when current_liabilities=0
backend.entity_comparison: 2 entities (KSC, Kanda), sorted by revenue desc, multi_entity=true
backend.data_consistency: Operational data excludes closing entries as designed

frontend.navigation: BI Keuangan accessible via ANALITIK (BI) menu group
frontend.page_load: Loads without console or page errors
frontend.kpi_cards: All 4 cards display with correct data-testid and values
frontend.monthly_chart: Recharts ComposedChart renders correctly with bars and line
frontend.ratio_cards: All 4 cards display, null values shown as '—' correctly
frontend.entity_comparison: Both chart and table render with 2 entity rows
frontend.controls: Year selector and refresh button functional
frontend.data_display: Values match backend API responses exactly
